mapper.select: select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_D where device_id = #{deviceId} and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)
select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_D where id = #{id} and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)
select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_D where (deleted is null or deleted = 0)

select m.* from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_D m join ODS_DWEQ_DM_AREA_D a on a.id = m.area_id where (m.deleted is null or m.deleted = 0) and (a.deleted is null or a.deleted = 0) and (a.id = #{areaTreeId} or instr('/' || nvl(a.path_ids, '') || '/', '/' || #{areaTreeId} || '/') > 0) order by m.id asc
select count(distinct device_id) from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_D where device_id is not null and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)

select count(distinct m.device_id) from ODS_DWEQ_DM_MONITOR_D m join ODS_DWEQ_DM_AREA_D a on a.id = m.area_id where m.device_id is not null and (m.deleted is null or m.deleted = 0) and (a.deleted is null or a.deleted = 0) and (a.id = #{areaTreeId} or instr('/' || nvl(a.path_ids, '') || '/', '/' || #{areaTreeId} || '/') > 0)
